nasb.text: Whoever seeks to keep his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life will preserve it.

esv.text: Whoever seeks to preserve his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life will keep it.

cnv.text: 凡是想保全生命的，必喪掉生命；凡是犧牲生命的，卻必保全生命。

ccb.text: 想保全生命的，必丧失生命；丧失生命的，必保全生命。

csbs.text: 凡想要保全自己生命的，将失去生命；凡失去自己生命的，将保存生命。
